style_prefix: same character consistency, male human age 25, sharp jawline, short black hair, deep eyes, neutral dark outfit, cinematic storytelling sequence, ultra smooth continuity between frames, psychological dark theme, hyper-realistic, 8k, soft film grain, dramatic shadows, volumetric lighting, moody contrast, deep blacks, subtle red and blue highlights, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, consistent face identity, slow cinematic progression, eerie atmosphere,
prompts: close-up of a calm human face in darkness with soft warm light on one side
the same face slowly losing warmth as shadows creep across the other half

face now half in darkness with a subtle unsettling smirk forming

camera shifts to show the helper’s shadow stretching unnaturally large behind

cut to a surreal glowing brain forming inside darkness
neural pathways lighting up with golden pulses spreading outward
brain activity intensifying with rhythmic glowing patterns
cut back to the same person standing in front of a mirror
the person looking at their normal reflection in silence
reflection slowly changing into a more confident powerful version
a glowing crown appearing on the reflection’s head
real person outside mirror looking slightly insecure and still
the reflection smiling with superiority while real face stays blank
cut to the person again helping someone with a slight smile
behind them a faint large silhouette of themselves begins to appear
the silhouette growing into a giant translucent ego version
giant version smiling with pride while looking down
normal person unaware of the giant figure behind
cut to close-up intense eye contact with the main character
broken mirror fragments slowly floating around the face
each fragment reflecting different emotions like kindness pride emptiness
lighting flickering between warm and cold across the face
face remaining still but eyes showing internal conflict
cut to wide shot of the person alone in a dark infinite void
faint shadow figures appearing far in the background
the person raising their hand slowly toward their face
fingers touching the skin as if something feels wrong
the face beginning to peel slightly like a thin mask
small crack of light visible beneath the surface
the mask being pulled further revealing glowing mist inside
close-up of hollow interior with soft swirling light
the removed face held in hand while staring forward

ground beneath starting to crack like reflective glass
faint childhood-like reflections appearing in the cracks
camera slowly pulling back showing isolation and darkness
final frame of the person standing still holding their own face in silence
